rationale: Review 1's single finding is real (the public lemma at line 64 lives in TauCeti.HopfAlgebra inside FunctorOfPoints.lean, is used only internally at 129, and pollutes a namespace the file path does not own); acting on it yields a clean private definition with no other changes. Review 2's placement demand requires splitting the entire file into new Bialgebra/ and HopfAlgebra/ dirs, contrary to the diff's explicit docstring framing it as the Layer-0 functor-of-points milestone; its secondary claim about a missing antipodeAlgHom is also absent from the diff. The resulting PR from Review 1 is therefore strictly better.
